data.title: US, Iran Weigh Potential Deal as Trump Seeks a Way Out of War
data.description: The US and Iran were circling around a fresh proposal to end the war on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump searches for an exit from a conflict that has elevated energy prices and damaged his political standing.
data.keywords: Iran,Donald John Trump,War,WAY OUT/THE,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Israel,Social Media,Washington,China,Abbas Araghchi,politics
